title: 日本ダービーの後に・星あげます！

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? I won? Against... Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I did it... I really did it! I truly gave it my all! Sniff!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But... I'm not like Ayabe. I have no one to offer
this star to.
choice_data_list: I'm sure you'll find someone if you look.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I can, can't I? Then, I'll take this star and give it
to...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O!
choice_data_list: Isn't it a little strange to give it to your peer?
Isn't it a little strange to give it to your peer?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... is that so? Then...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll give it to you, Trainer. Please, before it gets
cold...
choice_data_list: Oh no, I can't take it.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But why nooot?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What are you... doing?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ack?! Ayabe! Well, um...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for... getting in your way. But this was a
really important match to me, so...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You don't have to apologize. I'm not bothered.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I lost because I was too weak. That's all there is to
it. See you.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Oh... And you ran well, Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Um... Okay.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Ayabe wasn't upset with me...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I might have won today, but... Hopefully,
someday...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll be able to run like she does—for the sake of
someone else.

Admire Vega looks up at a daytime star,
undeterred in the face of her broken dreams.
Meisho Doto, quietly from behind, sends her off
with a polite bow of respect.
